nasb.text: They feared the Lord and served their own gods according to the custom of the nations from among whom they had been carried away into exile.

esv.text: So they feared the Lord but also served their own gods, after the manner of the nations from among whom they had been carried away.

cnv.text: 他們既懼怕耶和華，又服事他們的神；從哪個民族擄來的，就按照哪個民族的習俗服事他們的神。

ccb.text: 他们就这样既敬拜耶和华，又各按各的风俗供奉自己的神明。
